title: China Seas
writer: Jules Furthman, James Kevin McGuinness, Crosbie Garstin
actors: Clark Gable, Jean Harlow, Wallace Beery
plot: When earthy Dolly Portland is rejected by Captain Gaskell in favor of a socialite, she aids Jamesy McCardle, in league with Malay pirates, in his plot to seize Gaskell's ship.
